bead.title: bench: analytics read embedded cell metadata
bead.description:
Switch all benchmark analytics consumers from profile-YAML joins to embedded cell.profile.* reads. Delete the PROFILE_ALIASES and EXCLUDED_PROFILES rescue tables.

Files to modify:
- scripts/website/build-benchmark-data.py:
  - Delete PROFILE_ALIASES (~line 150) and EXCLUDED_PROFILES.
  - Replace lookups like 'profile_yaml[profile_id]' with reads from 'cell["profile"]'.
  - At line 644 area (profile_snapshot), prefer cell.profile.versioning.snapshot over the freeform string.
- scripts/benchmark/generate-report.py:
  - At lines ~296, 520, 551, 643, 877, 884 (md.get("server"), md.get("runtime"), md.get("model_id"), md.get("quant_label"), md.get("provider_surface"), md.get("model_family")), switch to cell.profile.metadata.* reads.
  - Drop reads of lane-block fields from scripts/benchmark/terminalbench-2-1-sweep.yaml.
- cmd/bench/terminalbench_import.go:
  - At lines 445-446 and 583-584 (prof.Versioning.Snapshot), read cell.profile.versioning.snapshot from the cell record rather than loading the profile YAML separately.
  - Other metadata reads similarly switch to cell-embedded.

Comparison classes (formerly comparison_groups: block) become query-time grouping: GROUP BY cell.profile.metadata.model_family, cell.profile.surface, cell.profile.harness. No standalone comparison-groups file.

In-scope files:
- scripts/website/build-benchmark-data.py
- scripts/benchmark/generate-report.py
- cmd/bench/terminalbench_import.go
- cmd/bench/terminalbench_import_test.go (cover embedded-read path)

Out-of-scope:
- Deletion of sweep YAML or cmd/bench/lanes*.go (PR 4)
- Backfill (must be done first - PR 2)

Pre-condition: PR 2 has run; every cell has embedded metadata.

Spec: docs/helix/02-design/plan-2026-05-15-benchmark-runner-simplification.md section 'PR 3'
bead.acceptance:
1. 'python scripts/website/build-benchmark-data.py' runs successfully against backfilled cells and produces an output that diffs to the pre-PR baseline only in fields sourced from cell-embedded data (verified by 'diff' against a saved pre-PR run).
2. 'rg "PROFILE_ALIASES|EXCLUDED_PROFILES" scripts/website/ scripts/benchmark/' returns zero hits.
3. 'rg "lanes:|recipes:|comparison_groups:|resource_groups:" scripts/website/build-benchmark-data.py scripts/benchmark/generate-report.py' returns zero hits.
4. 'go test ./cmd/bench/...' passes.
5. Website data pipeline produces a benchmark explorer Parquet identical (modulo profile-snapshot string format) to the pre-PR output.
